title: Want to send the message in a slack channel when an update is posted

posts.author: tehelay136 (teh elay)
posts.cookedHtml:
suppose an update is posted in any projects inside a board. I want to send the message to a slack channel I selected. I want to select the slack channel every time I post an update in the conversation. how to achieve this in monday.com?

any help is appreciated.
